calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2018 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2018 Continued To Oct-23-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Vivian Leung Lerche, Tel. No. 1-415-680-5731, specially appearing for the
Plaintiff;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff PMGI Financial, LLC's motion for entry of judgment pursuant to written stipulation of all the parties is granted. No opposition filed. PMGI is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Titus Lathen in the amount of $2,282.88, inclusive of attorney fees and costs and after deducting credits for payments received by PMGI. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
